Home / Shop / Pro Locker – Spec Sheet

Pro Locker

Other views & options

Pro Locker

Model # PL-PF-24

Lead time: custom-built in three months

From $599.00

Base model widths (with optional 4" base): up to 24" — $599. After 24" width base price $629; after 30" width base price $649.

Depth: 19"

Width: 18", 20", 22", 24", 26", 28", 30", 32"

Finish: Pre-Finished Birch Plywood (Essential line)

Accessories

Add-ons available — see Shop for details and to add to cart

  • Vented Panel (+$40)
  • Bottom cushion only; top and bottom cushions. Colors: black, dark blue, red, green, purple; other — note on order.
  • Hooks (+$15) — black or silver
  • Name Plate (+$10) — black or silver
  • Skate Hooks (+$25) — black or silver
  • Custom Logo (+$75) · custom orders only
  • Stick Rack (from $299)
  • Lock Box with Digital Key Lock (+$80)

Volume Discounts

Quantity Price
50 + lockers 3–5% discount – Contact us for pricing

Pro Locker – Features & Options

Specifications

Standard dimensions 24" W × 76" H × 19" D
Base Optional 4" high base
Frame 3/4"
Backing 3/4"
Weight Approx. 175 lbs
Construction 3/4" cabinetry grade birch plywood
Edgebanding PVC edgebanding
Width range 18" – 32"
Depth 19"
Finish Cabinet-Grade Pre-Finished Birch Plywood for Wood Lockers
Custom build 8–12 weeks — any size, options
Warranty 5 year warranty

Pro Locker dimensions (front and side)

Features

  • MPW-6C plywood core with premium melamine surface for a furniture-grade look
  • High scratch resistance and impact durability; moisture-resistant, dimensionally stable
  • Engineered for high-traffic athletic locker rooms
  • 14" high foot locker provides comfortable seating and secure equipment storage
  • Available in 18" to 32" widths; standard configuration 24" W x 76" H x 19" D with optional 4" base
  • 5 year warranty

Options

  • Vented front panel for increased airflow
  • Secure lock box integrated into the upper compartment
  • Bottom cushion or both cushions for added seating comfort
  • Skate hooks for hockey or figure skating storage
  • Custom logo option for teams or programs (custom orders only)
  • Name plate and additional gear hooks

finishing touches
